description: An audience list. Defines which DIDs are authorized for a private-tier resource. Owned by its creator. Modifying requires ManageAudience capability. Consulted by AudienceOracle outside the normal capability flow; this lexicon is exempt from the audience-list-reference structural rule (it IS the audience mechanism).

mode.description: Audience visibility mode. Determines how the AudienceOracle resolves membership: 'list' consults the members array; 'everyone' / 'followers' / 'following' / 'nobody' are oracle-resolved against host-side identity state. Optional at the lexicon level for 0.1-compatibility (absent reads as 'list'); 0.2+ writers populate it explicitly.
